name: Chocolate Mousse:
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces or 250 grams semi-sweet chocolate bar
3 tablespoons very strong coffee or Nescafe diluted in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Break chocolate into pieces and melt it in a double boiler with the coffee.
2. Beat egg yolks with sugar until lemon-colored (very well beaten, about 5 minutes using an electric beater).
3. Pour melted chocolate onto yolks while still beating until combined.
4. Stir in cognac and walnuts.
5. Whip egg whites until they form soft peaks.
6. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the yolk/chocolate mixture.
7. Chill at least 4 hours.
Note: If you bake this mousse in an oiled and floured pan, it will result in a delicious cake (350°F oven for about 15 minutes).
